description: T03/T05/T07 with clearer framing for intended routing

cases.title: Login Portal 403 Error
cases.description: Mobile users on Safari get HTTP 403 Forbidden from the login portal web application during sign-in. This is an application error, not an account permissions request — web server returns 403 before authentication completes.
cases.notes: Reframe: HTTP/app error, not access provisioning

cases.title: Unauthorized Data Access
cases.description: Security incident: user reported unauthorized file access to sensitive project folders they should not be able to view. Possible privilege escalation — audit NTFS permissions immediately.

cases.title: Database Connection Pool Exhausted
cases.description: PostgreSQL database connection pool exhausted during peak hours. Application logs show SQL too many connections errors and queries failing at the database tier.
cases.notes: Reframe: database-tier failure, not app bug
